Connect your tools, remove repetitive tasks, and keep projects moving. AutoFlow gives product, ops, and growth teams one clean place to automate approvals, handoffs, alerts, and follow-ups.

Visual workflow builder

Smart triggers and rules

Start workflows from form fills, payments, events, or thresholds with simple if-this-then-that logic.

Real-time team visibility

Track runs, catch failures early, and keep every stakeholder informed with clean activity updates.
